fullDisplayName: Galarian Mr. Rime SV021/SV122 Shining Fates
Galarian Mr. Mime SV020/SV122 Shining Fates

rules: VMAX rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Attach up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon VMAX. If you attached any Energy cards in this way, discard your hand.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Search your deck for an Energy card and a Darkness Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Draw 2 cards. If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, draw 2 more cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Search your deck for up to 2 Rare Fossil cards and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw 3 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 different Item cards that have the word "Ball" in their name, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Heal 50 damage from both Active Pokémon.

You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached.

The attacks of the Zacian V this card is attached to do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached.

The Zamazenta V this card is attached to gets +70 HP.

You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Draw 2 cards. If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, draw 2 more cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 different Item cards that have the word "Ball" in their name, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
